title: format_arg_help should return empty string for empty input
body:
format_arg_help() in radicli/util.py raises an error when passed an empty string or None.



Expected: return "" for empty or None input.
Fix: add a guard at the top of format_arg_help() to return "" if not text.
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py for empty string and None inputs.
